header.title: Publish data asset
header.subtitle: Publish an asset in the data space on behalf of the organization. Choose a URL or IPFS source.

alerts.securityNote: ProcureData does not store your data. We only facilitate the secure connection between your API and the authorized consumer.

step1.title: Data source
step1.description: Select the source type and configure the connection

step2.title: Asset metadata
step2.description: Descriptive information about the data asset

descriptionField.label: Description (optional)
descriptionField.placeholder: Describe the content and usefulness of the data...

step3.title: Pricing and access
step3.description: Define the pricing model and access configuration

accessConfig.title: Access configuration
accessConfig.usersAllowedHint: Optional. Leave blank to allow public access (no restrictions).
accessConfig.walletsDeniedHint: To block wallets of unregistered persons/companies.

step4.title: Summary and publish
step4.description: Review the configuration and publish the asset
step4.instruction: Choose the wallet to sign with and press Publish to register the asset on blockchain.

wallet.label: Wallet for publishing
wallet.noOrgWallets: This organization has no registered wallets. Register a wallet for the organization to publish.
